---
title: "Etude sur l'indisponibilité des liaisons"
author: "Oumar Mahamat"
date: "20/05/2025"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(123)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(treemapify)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(kableExtra)
library(gtsummary)
library(ggfortify)
library(reda)
library(reReg)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(ggpmisc)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Contexte
Les données normatives d'indisponibilité des liaisons sont utilisées pour valoriser de manière technico-économique des solutions sz développement de réseau. Ces données n'ont pas été mis à jour depuis plus de 10 ans, la dernière mise à jour datant de la note dite Duplan. Auparavant, les données utilisées séparaient les indisponibilités en données sur les cellules et sur la partie liaison, elles ont été mutualisées dans une relation affine avec une partie fixe et une partie variable selon la longueur des ouvrages. Cette variabilité s'applique aujourd'hui uniquement sur les indisponibilités fortuites courtes (IFO <120h) des liaisons aériennes. De plus, une liste d'ouvrages atypiques recense les liaisons qui sont plus défaillantes que le taux moyen fourni, il est nécessaire d'utliliser des taux d'indisponibilté spécifiques sur ces ouvrages même si la particularisation des taux n'est pas réalisée en pratique selon le REX.  


```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width = '100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("TX_histo.PNG")
```



```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width = '100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("vet.PNG")
```


```{r echo=FALSE}
source('graph_ifo.R', encoding = "UTF-8") # Fonctions des graphes

GAELA <- read.csv2("gaela.csv") %>%
  mutate(GAELA_2025=ifelse(AN_GAELA>0&AN_GAELA<2025,"Eligible 2024",ifelse(AN_GAELA>0&AN_GAELA<2041,"Non éligible","Non éligible"))) %>%
  select(OUV_COD_NAT,BRANCHE,GAELA_2025,AN_GAELA) %>% group_by(OUV_COD_NAT) %>% arrange(BRANCHE) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>% select(-BRANCHE)


LIT <- readRDS("LIT.RDS") %>% group_by(OUV_COD_NAT) %>% mutate(DT_DEB= map_dbl(list_AN, min)) %>% mutate(DT_FIN=map_dbl(list_AN, max)) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(id=paste0(OUV_COD_NAT,"-",VERSION_TOT)) %>%   mutate(AGE=ifelse(coalesce(LONGUEUR_LA,0)/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9,as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE_AER)/365.25,
                                                                  ifelse(coalesce(LONGUEUR_LS,0)/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9,as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE_SOUT)/365.25,
                                                                  as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-pmin(DATE_AER,DATE_SOUT,na.rm=T))/365.25))) %>%  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR_TOT) %>% mutate(CORROSION=as.factor(CORROSION)) %>% 
mutate(NATURE_COND=ifelse(NATURE_COND=="ALUMINIUM+ACIER/ALMELEC+ACIER","ALU+ACIER\nALMELEC+ACIER",NATURE_COND))%>% mutate(NATURE_COND=ifelse(NATURE_COND=="CUIVRE/ALUMINIUM","CUIVRE/ALU",NATURE_COND)) %>% 
mutate(TECHNOLOGIE=str_replace_all(TECHNOLOGIE,"Synthétique","Synth.")) %>% left_join(GAELA,by="OUV_COD_NAT") %>% mutate(GAELA_2025=coalesce(GAELA_2025,"Non éligible"))


LA <- LIT %>% filter(LONGUEUR_LA/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9) %>% rename(DATE=DATE_AER) %>% mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR_LA) %>% 
  select(id,OUV_COD_NAT,NT_LIT,DATE,HTB,AN_REF,DT_DEB,DT_FIN,LONGUEUR,DATE_COND,NATURE_COND,DATE_SUPPORT,NATURESUBJECTILE,CORROSION,TECHNOLOGIE,AGE_SUP_MAX,Q999,GAELA_2025) %>% 
  mutate(DATE=as.Date(ifelse(is.na(DATE),as.Date(pmin(DATE_SUPPORT,DATE_COND,na.rm = T)),DATE),origin="1970-01-01")) %>% filter(!is.na(DATE)) %>% 
  mutate(AGE=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE)/365.25) %>% 
  mutate(AGE_LIT_DEB=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(DT_DEB,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE)/365.25) %>% 
  mutate(VET_SUP_LIT=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-as.Date(DATE_SUPPORT))/(365.25*AGE_SUP_MAX)) %>%
  mutate(VET_COND_LIT=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-as.Date(DATE_COND))/(365.25*85))  %>%
  mutate(VET=pmax(VET_SUP_LIT,VET_COND_LIT,na.rm=T)) %>% select(-VET_SUP_LIT,-VET_COND_LIT) %>% 
  mutate(VET_SUP_LIT_D=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(DT_DEB,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-as.Date(DATE_SUPPORT))/(365.25*AGE_SUP_MAX)) %>%
  mutate(VET_COND_LIT_D=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(DT_DEB,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-as.Date(DATE_COND))/(365.25*85))  %>%
  mutate(VET_LIT_DEB=pmax(VET_SUP_LIT_D,VET_COND_LIT_D,na.rm=T)) %>% select(-VET_SUP_LIT_D,-VET_COND_LIT_D)

LS <- LIT %>% filter(LONGUEUR_LS/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9)  %>% rename(DATE=DATE_SOUT)  %>% mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR_LS) %>% 
  select(id,OUV_COD_NAT,NT_LIT,DATE,HTB,AN_REF,DT_DEB,DT_FIN,LONGUEUR,DATE_COND,NATURE_COND,DATE_SUPPORT,NATURESUBJECTILE,CORROSION,TECHNOLOGIE,AGE_SUP_MAX,Q999,GAELA_2025) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(DATE)) %>% 
  mutate(AGE=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(AN_REF,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE)/365.25) %>%
  mutate(AGE_LIT_DEB=as.numeric(as.Date(paste0(DT_DEB,"-12-31"),origin="1970-01-01")-DATE)/365.25) %>% 
  mutate(VET=AGE/35) %>% mutate(VET_LIT_DEB=AGE_LIT_DEB/35)

LIT_XY <- readRDS("LIT_XY.RDS") %>% filter(OUV_COD_NAT %in% LIT$OUV_COD_NAT) %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT) %>% right_join(LIT,by="OUV_COD_NAT") %>% st_as_sf(crs=2154) %>% 
  left_join(read.csv2("tension.csv"),by="NT_LIT")

IFO <- readRDS("IFO.RDS")  %>% filter(TYPE_IFO!="TRES_COURT") %>% filter(AN<2025) %>%
mutate(CORROSION=as.factor(CORROSION)) %>% 
select(ERX_ID,TYPE_IFO,ERX_DTDEB,ERX_DT_TOTH,NATURE,NATURE_SUP,SOURCE,CONFIGURATION,id,OUV_COD_NAT,ERX_COMMENT,
       NT_LIT,HTB,DATE_AER,LONGUEUR_LA,DATE_COND,NATURE_COND,DATE_SUPPORT,NATURESUBJECTILE,CORROSION,AGE_SUP_MAX,DATE_SOUT,LONGUEUR_LS,TECHNOLOGIE,LONGUEUR_TOT,Q999) %>% 
  mutate(AGE_IFO=ifelse(LONGUEUR_LA/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9,as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-DATE_AER)/365.25,
                                                                  ifelse(LONGUEUR_LS/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9,as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-DATE_SOUT)/365.25,
                                                                         as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-pmin(DATE_AER,DATE_SOUT,na.rm=T))/365.25))) %>% 
  mutate(NATURE_COND=ifelse(NATURE_COND=="ALUMINIUM+ACIER/ALMELEC+ACIER","ALU+ACIER\nALMELEC+ACIER",NATURE_COND))%>%
  mutate(NATURE_COND=ifelse(NATURE_COND=="CUIVRE/ALUMINIUM","CUIVRE/ALU",NATURE_COND)) %>% 
  mutate(TECHNOLOGIE=str_replace_all(TECHNOLOGIE,"Synthétique","Synth."))  %>% left_join(GAELA,by="OUV_COD_NAT") %>% mutate(GAELA_2025=coalesce(GAELA_2025,"Non éligible")) %>% 
  mutate(NT_LIT=as.factor(NT_LIT),  CORROSION=as.factor(CORROSION),NATURE_COND=as.factor(NATURE_COND),NATURESUBJECTILE=as.factor(NATURESUBJECTILE),GAELA_2025=as.factor(GAELA_2025),TECHNOLOGIE=as.factor(TECHNOLOGIE))

  
IFO_LA <-IFO %>% filter(LONGUEUR_LA/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9) %>% rename(DATE=DATE_AER) %>% rename(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR_LA) %>%   filter(!is.na(DATE))  %>% filter(TYPE_IFO!="TRES_LONG") %>% 
  mutate(DATE=as.Date(ifelse(is.na(DATE),as.Date(pmin(DATE_SUPPORT,DATE_COND,na.rm = T)),DATE),origin="1970-01-01")) %>%  filter(!is.na(DATE)) %>% 
  mutate(AGE_IFO=as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-DATE)/365.25) %>% 
  mutate(VET_SUP=as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-as.Date(DATE_SUPPORT))/(365.25*AGE_SUP_MAX)) %>% 
  mutate(VET_COND=as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-as.Date(DATE_COND))/(365.25*85)) %>%
  mutate(VET_IFO=pmax(VET_COND,VET_SUP,na.rm=T))  %>% select(-VET_SUP,-VET_COND)  
  
IFO_LS <-IFO %>% filter(LONGUEUR_LS/LONGUEUR_TOT>0.9)  %>% rename(DATE=DATE_SOUT) %>% rename(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR_LS) %>%  filter(!is.na(DATE))  %>% filter(TYPE_IFO!="TRES_LONG") %>%   
  filter(!is.na(DATE)) %>% 
  mutate(AGE_IFO=as.numeric(as.Date(ERX_DTDEB)-DATE)/365.25) %>%  
  mutate(VET_IFO=AGE_IFO/35)

```


# Analyse patrimoniale des LIT

## Cartographie des liaisons en 2024

```{r, echo=FALSE}
MAP <- LIT_XY %>% filter(AN_REF==2024) %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT,CONFIGURATION,NT_LIT,LONGUEUR,AGE,NATURE_COND,NATURESUBJECTILE,TECHNOLOGIE,HTB,Couleur) %>% st_simplify(dTolerance = 200) %>% st_transform(4326) %>% mutate(dashstyle=ifelse(CONFIGURATION=="Souterraine","5, 5","")) %>% filter(!OUV_COD_NAT %in% "CHAFAL41ZC.R5") %>% filter(!st_is_empty(geometry))

pal_AGE <- colorNumeric(  palette = viridis::viridis(256, option = "magma", direction = -1),   domain = c(0, 120))
pal_TEN <- colorFactor(    palette = c("#3b3b3b","#2a5dbd","#2aa53b","#ff2a2a","pink","#bf0054","#ff8000", "#b6592a","#acacac"),   domain = c("<45kV","150kV","225kV","400kV","45kV","63kV","90kV","COURANT CONTINU","HORS TENSION"))
pal_CONFIG <- colorFactor(    palette = c("red", "green", "blue"),   domain = c("Aérienne","Aéro-souterraine","Souterraine"))
pal_COND <- colorFactor(    palette = c("#f8766d","#a3a500", "#00b0f6", "#e76bf3"),   domain = c("ACSS/ACCR","ALMELEC","ALU+ACIER\nALMELEC+ACIER","CUIVRE/ALU"))
pal_SUPPORT <- colorFactor(    palette = c("#f8766d", "#a3a500", "#00bf7d","#00b0f6","#e76bf3"),   domain = c("AG - Acier galva","AN - Acier noir","B - Bois","Be - Béton","NR - Autre"))


text_popup <- function(OUV_COD_NAT,CONFIGURATION,NT_LIT,LONGUEUR,AGE,NATURE_COND,NATURESUBJECTILE,TECHNOLOGIE) { paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>",  CONFIGURATION, "<br/>", "Tension: ", NT_LIT, "<br/>",
                                                                          "Longueur : ",round(LONGUEUR/1000,1), " km<br/>","Age : ",round(AGE,1), " ans<br/>",
                                                                           "Conducteur : ",NATURE_COND, "<br/>", "Suppport : ",NATURESUBJECTILE, "<br/>","Technologie : ",TECHNOLOGIE, "<br/>") }

leaflet( MAP,options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,zoomSnap = 0.1)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) {   el.style.height = '500px';  }") %>%
  setView(lng=2.9,lat=46.9,zoom =5.7) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,group="Plan",options=providerTileOptions(opacity=0.6)) %>%
  addPolylines(group = "LIGNES_TOT",layerId =~OUV_COD_NAT,  weight =~2,opacity =1, dashArray =~dashstyle,  color=~pal_AGE(AGE),
               popup=~text_popup(OUV_COD_NAT,CONFIGURATION,NT_LIT,LONGUEUR,AGE,NATURE_COND,NATURESUBJECTILE,TECHNOLOGIE))%>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_AGE,values=c(0,120),position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Age",layerId = "legend-age",className = "legend legend-age") %>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_TEN,values=~NT_LIT,position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Tension",layerId = "legend-tension",className = "legend legend-tension") %>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_CONFIG,values=~CONFIGURATION,position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Configuration",layerId = "legend-config",className = "legend legend-config") %>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_COND,values=~NATURE_COND,position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Conducteur",layerId = "legend-cond",className = "legend legend-cond") %>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_SUPPORT,values=~NATURESUBJECTILE,position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Support",layerId = "legend-support",className = "legend legend-support") %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) { console.log('el:', el);var ageLegend = el.querySelector('.legend-age');console.log('ageLegend:', ageLegend);
  if (ageLegend) { ageLegend.style.backgroundColor = 'white';ageLegend.style.opacity = 1;  }}") %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) { console.log('el:', el);var tenLegend = el.querySelector('.legend-tension');console.log('tenLegend:', tenLegend);
  if (tenLegend) {  tenLegend.style.display = 'none';tenLegend.style.backgroundColor = 'white';tenLegend.style.opacity = 1;}}") %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) { console.log('el:', el);var condLegend = el.querySelector('.legend-cond');console.log('condLegend:', condLegend);
  if (condLegend) {  condLegend.style.display = 'none';condLegend.style.backgroundColor = 'white';condLegend.style.opacity = 1;  }}") %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) { console.log('el:', el);var configLegend = el.querySelector('.legend-config');console.log('configLegend:', configLegend);
  if (configLegend) {  configLegend.style.display = 'none';configLegend.style.backgroundColor = 'white';configLegend.style.opacity = 1;  }}") %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) { console.log('el:', el);var supportLegend = el.querySelector('.legend-support');console.log('supportLegend:', supportLegend);
  if (supportLegend) {  supportLegend.style.display = 'none';supportLegend.style.backgroundColor = 'white';supportLegend.style.opacity = 1;  }}") %>%
  addEasyButtonBar(
    easyButton(icon = "fa-hourglass",title = "AGE",
               onClick = JS(sprintf("function(btn,map){var initial = %s;var layers = map.layerManager.getLayerGroup('LIGNES_TOT').getLayers();
          var legend_age = map.getContainer().querySelector('.legend-age'); if (legend_age) { if (legend_age.style.display === 'none') {legend_age.style.display = 'block';  } else { legend_age.style.display = 'none';  }}
          layers.forEach(function(layer,i){ var current = layer.options.color;var target = initial[i];layer.setStyle({color: target});});}", jsonlite::toJSON(pal_AGE(MAP$AGE))))),
    easyButton(icon = "fa-plug", title = "TENSION",
               onClick = JS(sprintf("function(btn,map){var initial = %s;var layers = map.layerManager.getLayerGroup('LIGNES_TOT').getLayers();
          var legend_ten = map.getContainer().querySelector('.legend-tension'); if (legend_ten) { if (legend_ten.style.display === 'none') {legend_ten.style.display = 'block';  } else { legend_ten.style.display = 'none';  }}
          layers.forEach(function(layer,i){ var current = layer.options.color;var target = initial[i];layer.setStyle({color: target});});}",jsonlite::toJSON(pal_TEN(MAP$NT_LIT))))),
    easyButton(icon = "fa-bolt", title = "CONFIG",
               onClick = JS(sprintf("function(btn,map){var initial = %s;var layers = map.layerManager.getLayerGroup('LIGNES_TOT').getLayers();
          var legend_config = map.getContainer().querySelector('.legend-config'); if (legend_config) { if (legend_config.style.display === 'none') {legend_config.style.display = 'block';  } else { legend_config.style.display = 'none';  }}
          layers.forEach(function(layer,i){ var current = layer.options.color;var target = initial[i];layer.setStyle({color: target});});}",jsonlite::toJSON(pal_CONFIG(MAP$CONFIGURATION)) ))),
    easyButton(icon = "fa-anchor", title = "CONDUCTEUR",
               onClick = JS(sprintf("function(btn,map){var initial = %s;var layers = map.layerManager.getLayerGroup('LIGNES_TOT').getLayers();
          var legend_cond = map.getContainer().querySelector('.legend-cond'); if (legend_cond) { if (legend_cond.style.display === 'none') {legend_cond.style.display = 'block';  } else { legend_cond.style.display = 'none';  }}
          layers.forEach(function(layer,i){ var current = layer.options.color;var target = initial[i];layer.setStyle({color: target});});}",jsonlite::toJSON(pal_COND(MAP$NATURE_COND))))),
    easyButton(icon = "fa-link", title = "SUPPORT",
               onClick = JS(sprintf("function(btn,map){var initial = %s;var layers = map.layerManager.getLayerGroup('LIGNES_TOT').getLayers();
          var legend_sup = map.getContainer().querySelector('.legend-support'); if (legend_sup) { if (legend_sup.style.display === 'none') {legend_sup.style.display = 'block';  } else { legend_sup.style.display = 'none';  }}
          layers.forEach(function(layer,i){ var current = layer.options.color;var target = initial[i];layer.setStyle({color: target});});}", jsonlite::toJSON(pal_SUPPORT(MAP$NATURESUBJECTILE)))))
  )

```


## Etat des lieux des liaisons en 2024  {.tabset }

### Toutes liaisons  {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=7,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

choix <- data_frame(type=c("CONFIGURATION","HTB","NT_LIT"),lib=c("Type LIT","Domaine Tension","Tension"))
LIT_2024 <- LIT %>% filter(AN_REF==2024)

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(histo_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]), violin_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]), nrow = 2))
cat("  \n")
}
```


### Liaisons aériennes  {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=8,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

choix <- data_frame(type=c("NT_LIT","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","CORROSION"),lib=c("Tension","Conducteur","Support","Corrosion"))
LIT_2024 <- LA %>% filter(AN_REF==2024)

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(histo_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),histo_LIT_VET(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]), violin_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),pie_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),ncol=2, nrow = 2))
cat("  \n")
}
```

### Liaisons souterraines  {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=8,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

choix <- data_frame(type=c("NT_LIT","TECHNOLOGIE"),lib=c("Tension","Techno"))
LIT_2024 <- LS %>% filter(AN_REF==2024)

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(histo_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),histo_LIT_VET(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]), violin_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),pie_LIT(LIT_2024,choix$type[i]),ncol=2, nrow = 2))
cat("  \n")
}
```



```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

eq_tension <- data.frame(
TENS_NUM=c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7","9"),
TENSION=c("HTA","45 kV","63kV","90 kV","150 kV","225 kV","400 kV","HVDC"),
TENSION_SUP=c("HTA","HTB1","HTB1","HTB1","HTB2","HTB2","HTB3","HVDC")
)

TX_LIGNES <- readRDS("TX_LIGNES_F.RDS")    %>%
  filter(!is.na(CM)) %>% filter(!substr(id,1,1) %in% c(".","1","0","2")) %>%
  rename(AN=caseyear) %>%
  mutate(TENS_NUM=substr(id,7,7)) %>%
  mutate(CM=ifelse(CM=="TE NORMANDIE PARIS","CM-NTR",CM)) %>%
  left_join(eq_tension,by="TENS_NUM") %>%
  filter(NB>4000)

choix <- data_frame(type=c("TENSION_SUP","TYPE"),lib=c("Tension","Type"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n###",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(cowplot::plot_grid(T95_LIT(TX_LIGNES,choix$type[i]), T95_LIT_M(TX_LIGNES,choix$type[i]), ncol = 2))
  cat("  \n")
}
```


### Cartographie T95> 70%

```{r, echo=FALSE}


TX2024 <- TX_LIGNES %>%
  filter(AN==2024) %>%
  filter(Q95<1.1) %>%
  filter(Q95>0.7) %>%
  mutate(COUL=ifelse(TENSION_SUP=="HTB1","deepskyblue",ifelse(TENSION_SUP=="HTB2","chartreuse",ifelse(TENSION_SUP=="HTB3","tomato","gray")))) %>% mutate(COUL=as.character(COUL)) %>%
  rename(OUV_COD_NAT=id) %>%
  # select(OUV_COD_NAT=id,COUL,TENSION,Q95,Q99,Q999) %>%
  left_join(LIT_XY %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT),by="OUV_COD_NAT") %>% st_as_sf(crs=2154) %>% st_transform(4326)


leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,zoomSnap = 0.1)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("function(el, x) {
    el.style.height = '500px';
  }") %>%
  setView(lng=2.9,lat=46.9,zoom =5.7) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,group="Plan",options=providerTileOptions(opacity=0.6)) %>%
  addPolylines( data =TX2024%>% filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)),
    layerId =~OUV_COD_NAT,    group = "Lignes RTE",    color=~COUL,    weight =~3,opacity =1,
    popup=~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>",
                  "Tension: ", TENSION,"kV", "<br/>",
                  "Q95 : ", round(Q95*100,2), "<br/>"    )) %>%
          addLegend(data=  data.frame(Couleur=c("deepskyblue","chartreuse","tomato"),espace=c("HTB1","HTB2","HTB3")),
              position="bottomright",colors=~Couleur,labels=~espace,opacity=1,title="Q95")

```


# Analyse des indisponibilités fortuites Siquael


## Typologie des IFO  {.tabset }


### Nombre {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("TYPE_IFO","CONFIGURATION","HTB","NATURESUBJECTILE","NATURE_COND"),lib=c("Type IFO","Type LIT","Tension","Support","Conducteur"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","RIEN")$nbIFO,
                   GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","RIEN")$pie_nbIFO,
                   GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","RIEN")$nbIFO, nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

### Temps {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("TYPE_IFO","CONFIGURATION","HTB","NATURESUBJECTILE","NATURE_COND"),lib=c("Type IFO","Type LIT","Tension","Support","Conducteur"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid( GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","RIEN")$tempsIFO,
                          GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","RIEN")$pie_tempsIFO,
                          GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","RIEN")$tempsIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```


## Cartographie des IFO  {.tabset }

### Nature
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=7,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

IFO_XY <- IFO %>% filter(TYPE_IFO %in% c("COURT","LONG")) %>% left_join(LIT_XY %>% st_centroid() %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT),by="OUV_COD_NAT") %>% st_as_sf(crs=2154) %>% st_jitter() %>% st_transform(4326)
pal_IFO <- colorFactor(    palette = c("#e76bf3","#00bf7d", "#f8766d", "#00b0f6","#a3a500"),   domain = c("AUTRE/INDETERMINE","CLIENT/EXPLOIT/SYSTEME","ENVIRONNEMENT","FH/AGRESSION","MATERIEL"))


leaflet(IFO_XY ,options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,zoomSnap = 0.1)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender("function(el, x) {  el.style.height = '500px';}") %>%
  setView(lng=2.9,lat=46.9,zoom =5.7) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,group="Plan",options=providerTileOptions(opacity=0.6)) %>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_IFO,values=~NATURE_SUP,position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Nature") %>%
  addCircleMarkers(radius=~pmin(pmax(2,0.6*sqrt(ERX_DT_TOTH)),20),weight =0.5,stroke=TRUE,color="black",fillOpacity=1,
                     fillColor = ~pal_IFO(NATURE_SUP),
                     layerId = ~ERX_ID,
                     popup =  ~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>","Tension: ", NT_LIT,"kV", "<br/>","Date IFO: ", as.Date(ERX_DTDEB), "<br/>","Durée IFO: ", round(ERX_DT_TOTH,1),"h", "<br/>",
                                      "Circonstance IFO: ", NATURE_SUP, "<br/>","Nature IFO: ", NATURE, "<br/>","Source indispo: ", SOURCE, "<br/>",
                                      "<br/>",
                                      "Commentaire: ", ERX_COMMENT, "<br/>"
                                      ))
```


### Taux de défaillance

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LIT_XY %>% filter(AN_REF==2024)%>% left_join(IFO %>% filter(TYPE_IFO!="TRES_LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% tally(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>% mutate(TX=round(DEF/AN_SURV,2)) %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT,id,NT_LIT,VERSION_TOT,n,LONGUEUR,AN_SURV,DEF,TX) %>%
  st_simplify(dTolerance = 200) %>% st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_transform(4326)  %>% filter(!OUV_COD_NAT %in% c("CHAFAL41ZC.R5","VIELML61ZC.SE","DAMBRL61ZCARR","I.JOUL41ZPIOU","SSCRIL31ZBUZY","BUZY L31ZBUZY")) %>% filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
  mutate(TX2=ifelse(TX>2,2,TX))


pal_TX <- colorNumeric(  palette = viridis::viridis(256, option = "magma", direction =1),   domain = c(0, 2))


leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,zoomSnap = 0.1)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) {   el.style.height = '500px';  }") %>%
  setView(lng=2.9,lat=46.9,zoom =5.7) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,group="Plan",options=providerTileOptions(opacity=0.6)) %>%
  addPolylines(data=LIT_TX %>% filter(TX!=0),group = "LIGNES_TOT",layerId =~id, opacity =1,
               weight =~(sqrt(20*(TX2)+0.01)), color=~pal_TX(TX2),
               popup=~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>","Version : ", VERSION_TOT, "<br/>","Tension: ", NT_LIT, "<br/>",
                             "Nombre de défaillances : ", n, "<br/>","Nb années : ", AN_SURV, "<br/>","Taux de défaillance annuel : ", TX, "<br/>")) %>%
    addPolylines(data=LIT_TX %>% filter(TX==0),group = "LIGNES_ZERO",layerId =~id, opacity =1, weight =0.5, color=~"grey",
               popup=~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>","Version : ", VERSION_TOT, "<br/>","Tension: ", NT_LIT, "<br/>",
                             "Nombre de défaillances : ", n, "<br/>","Nb années : ", AN_SURV, "<br/>","Taux de défaillance annuel : ", TX, "<br/>"))%>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_TX,values=c(0,2),position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Taux de déf.")



```


### Durée de défaillance

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LIT_XY %>% filter(AN_REF==2024)%>% left_join(IFO %>% filter(TYPE_IFO!="TRES_LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>%  summarize(n=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T)),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>% mutate(TX=round(DEF/AN_SURV,2)) %>% select(OUV_COD_NAT,id,NT_LIT,VERSION_TOT,n,LONGUEUR,AN_SURV,DEF,TX) %>%
  st_simplify(dTolerance = 200) %>% st_transform(4326) %>%
  st_transform(4326)  %>% filter(!OUV_COD_NAT %in% c("CHAFAL41ZC.R5","VIELML61ZC.SE","DAMBRL61ZCARR","I.JOUL41ZPIOU","SSCRIL31ZBUZY","BUZY L31ZBUZY")) %>% filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
   mutate(TX2=ifelse(TX>200,200,TX))


pal_TX <- colorNumeric(  palette = viridis::viridis(256, option = "magma", direction =1),   domain = c(0, 200))


leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,zoomSnap = 0.1)) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(" function(el, x) {   el.style.height = '500px';  }") %>%
  setView(lng=2.9,lat=46.9,zoom =5.7) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,group="Plan",options=providerTileOptions(opacity=0.6)) %>%
  addPolylines(data=LIT_TX %>% filter(TX!=0),group = "LIGNES_TOT",layerId =~id, opacity =1,
               weight =~(sqrt(0.2*(TX2)+0.01)), color=~pal_TX(TX2),
               popup=~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>","Version : ", VERSION_TOT, "<br/>","Tension: ", NT_LIT, "<br/>",
                             "Durée de défaillances : ", n, "<br/>","Nb années : ", AN_SURV, "<br/>","Durée de défaillance annuelle : ", TX, "<br/>")) %>%
    addPolylines(data=LIT_TX %>% filter(TX==0),group = "LIGNES_ZERO",layerId =~id, opacity =1, weight =0.5, color=~"grey",
               popup=~paste0(as.character(OUV_COD_NAT), "<br/>","Version : ", VERSION_TOT, "<br/>","Tension: ", NT_LIT, "<br/>",
                             "Durée de défaillances : ", round(n,1), "h<br/>","Nb années : ", AN_SURV, "<br/>","Durée de défaillance annuelle : ", round(TX,1), "h par an<br/>"))%>%
  addLegend(pal=pal_TX,values=c(0,200),position="bottomright",opacity=1,title="Durée de déf. annuelle")

```








## Durée des IFO  {.tabset }

### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=6,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("TYPE_IFO","NT_LIT","HTB","CORROSION","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","GAELA_2025"),lib=c("Tout","Tension","Niv. Tension","Corrosion","Conducteur","Support","Eligible GAELA"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(violintemps_IFO(IFO_LA,"COURT",choix$type[i],130,10)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO courtes"),
                         violintemps_IFO(IFO_LA,"LONG",choix$type[i],3000,200)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO longues"), ncol = 2))
cat("  \n")
}
cat("  \n#### Age\n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(violintempsage_IFO(IFO_LA,"COURT",130,10)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO courtes"),
                         violintempsage_IFO(IFO_LA,"LONG",3000,200)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO longues"), ncol = 2))

```


### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=6,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

choix <- data_frame(type=c("TYPE_IFO","NT_LIT","HTB","TECHNOLOGIE"),lib=c("Tout","Tension","Niv. Tension","Technologie"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(violintemps_IFO(IFO_LS,"COURT",choix$type[i],130,10)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO courtes"),
                         violintemps_IFO(IFO_LS,"LONG",choix$type[i],3000,200)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO longues"), ncol = 2))
cat("  \n")
}
cat("  \n#### Age\n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(violintempsage_IFO(IFO_LS,"COURT",130,10)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO courtes"),
                         violintempsage_IFO(IFO_LS,"LONG",3000,200)+ggtitle("Temps des IFO longues"), ncol = 2))
```



## Caractéristiques des IFO  {.tabset }

### Liaisons aériennes  {.tabset }

#### IFO courtes {.tabset }
##### Nombre {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$violin_nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","COURT")$pie_nbIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

##### Temps {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$tempsIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$violin_tempsIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","COURT")$pie_tempsIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```


##### Taux d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%  group_by(id) %>% tally(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>% mutate(TX=DEF/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>70,"70+","70-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%    bold_labels()

```

##### Temps d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(n=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T)),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>% mutate(TX=DEF/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>70,"70+","70-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%    bold_labels()

```


#### IFO longues {.tabset }
##### Nombre {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$violin_nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","LONG")$pie_nbIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

##### Temps {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid( GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$tempsIFO,
                          GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$violin_tempsIFO,
                          GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","LONG")$pie_tempsIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

##### Taux d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% tally(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>70,"70+","70-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%    bold_labels()

```

##### Temps d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(n=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T)),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>70,"70+","70-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%  bold_labels()

```



### Liaisons souterraines  {.tabset }

#### IFO courtes {.tabset }
##### Nombre {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$violin_nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","COURT")$pie_nbIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

##### Temps {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid( GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$tempsIFO,
                          GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LA,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","COURT")$violin_tempsIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","COURT")$pie_tempsIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```



##### Taux d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%  group_by(id) %>% tally(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>40,"40+","40-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,TECHNOLOGIE,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%    bold_labels()

```

##### Temps d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(n=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T)),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>40,"40+","40-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%  bold_labels()

```


#### IFO longues {.tabset }
##### Nombre {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$violin_nbIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","LONG")$pie_nbIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```

##### Temps {.tabset }
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("NATURE_SUP","NATURE","SOURCE","HTB"),lib=c("Nature sup.","Nature","Source","Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n######",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
print(cowplot::plot_grid(GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$tempsIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AGE_IFO","LONG")$violin_tempsIFO,
                         GRAPH_IFO_NB(IFO_LS,choix$type[i],"AN_IFO","LONG")$pie_tempsIFO,nrow=3))
  cat("  \n")
}

```


##### Taux d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% tally(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>40,"40+","40-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%   tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,TECHNOLOGIE,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%    bold_labels()
```


##### Temps d'IFO par liaison.an
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=10,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
LIT_TX <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(n=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T)),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(DEF=coalesce(n,0))%>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10000,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=ifelse(CAT_AGE>40,"40+","40-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET))


LIT_TX %>%    tbl_custom_summary(    include = c(HTB,CAT_LONG,NATURESUBJECTILE,NATURE_COND,CAT_AGE,CAT_VET,GAELA_2025),    stat_fns = ~ ratio_summary("DEF", "AN_SURV"),
    statistic = ~"{ratio} [{conf.low} - {conf.high}] ({num}/{denom})",    digits = ~ c(4, 4, 4, 0, 0),    overall_row = TRUE,    overall_row_label = "Total"  ) %>%  bold_labels()

```



## Estimation des événements réccurents {.tabset }


### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset}

#### IFO courtes {.tabset}
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","NT_LIT","HTB","CORROSION","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","GAELA_2025"),lib=c("Tous","Tension","Niv. Tension","Corrosion","Conducteur","Support","Eligible GAELA"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n#####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  a <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_T,LA,IFO_LA,"TYPE_IFO","COURT",choix$type[i])%>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
    mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
  b <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_VET,LA,IFO_LA,"TYPE_IFO","COURT",choix$type[i])
print(cowplot::plot_grid(a %>% GRAPH_RECUR(120,10,22,2,"Age de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO courtes à l'âge des LA"),
                         b %>% GRAPH_RECUR(2,0.2,22,2,"Vétusté de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO courtes à la vétusté des LA"), ncol = 2))
print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(120,10,0.7,0.05,"Age de la LIT","Défaillance annuelle","Espérance de défaillance annuelle COURT selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}
```

#### IFO longues {.tabset}
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","NT_LIT","HTB","CORROSION","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","GAELA_2025"),lib=c("Tous","Tension","Niv. Tension","Corrosion","Conducteur","Support","Eligible GAELA"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n#####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  a <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_T,LA,IFO_LA,"TYPE_IFO","LONG",choix$type[i])%>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
    mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
  b <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_VET,LA,IFO_LA,"TYPE_IFO","LONG",choix$type[i])
print(cowplot::plot_grid(a %>% GRAPH_RECUR(120,10,6,1,"Age de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO longues à l'âge des LA"),
                         b %>% GRAPH_RECUR(2,0.2,6,1,"Vétusté de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO longues à la vétusté des LA"), ncol = 2))
print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(120,10,0.1,0.01,"Age de la LIT","Défaillance annuelle","Espérance de défaillance annuelle LONG selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}
```


### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset}

#### IFO courtes {.tabset}
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","NT_LIT","HTB","TECHNOLOGIE"),lib=c("Tous","Tension","Niv. Tension","Technologie"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n#####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  a <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_T,LS,IFO_LS,"TYPE_IFO","COURT",choix$type[i])%>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
    mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
  b <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_VET,LS,IFO_LS,"TYPE_IFO","COURT",choix$type[i])
print(cowplot::plot_grid(a %>% GRAPH_RECUR(100,10,12,1,"Age de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO courtes à l'âge des LS"),
                         b %>% GRAPH_RECUR(2.8,0.2,12,1,"Vétusté de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO courtes à la vétusté des LS"), ncol = 2))
print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(100,10,0.7,0.05,"Age de la LIT","Défaillance annuelle","Espérance de défaillance annuelle COURT selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}
```


#### IFO longues {.tabset}
```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","NT_LIT","HTB","TECHNOLOGIE"),lib=c("Tous","Tension","Niv. Tension","Technologie"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n#####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  a <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_T,LS,IFO_LS,"TYPE_IFO","LONG",choix$type[i])%>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
    mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
  b <- COURBE_NA_T(RECUR_VET,LS,IFO_LS,"TYPE_IFO","LONG",choix$type[i])
print(cowplot::plot_grid(a %>% GRAPH_RECUR(100,10,12,1,"Age de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO longues à l'âge des LS"),
                         b %>% GRAPH_RECUR(2.8,0.2,12,1,"Vétusté de la LIT","Nombre d'IFO cumulé","IFO longues à la vétusté des LS"), ncol = 2))
print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(120,10,1,0.05,"Age de la LIT","Défaillance annuelle","Espérance de défaillance annuelle LONG selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}
```


## Temps cumulé d'indisponibilité {.tabset }



### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","NT_LIT","HTB","CORROSION","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","GAELA_2025"),lib=c("Tous","Tension","Niv. Tension","Corrosion","Conducteur","Support","Eligible GAELA"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
   a <- COURBE_NA_T_TEMPS(RECUR_T,LA,IFO_LA,"","",choix$type[i]) %>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
    mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
   b <- COURBE_NA_T_TEMPS(RECUR_VET,LA,IFO_LA,"","",choix$type[i])

print(cowplot::plot_grid(a%>% GRAPH_RECUR(120,10,1500,100,"Age de la LIT","Temps cumulé d'IFO","Durée d'indisponibilité cumulée selon âge"),
                         b%>% GRAPH_RECUR(2,0.2,1500,100,"Vétusté de la LIT","Temps cumulé d'IFO","Durée d'indisponibilité cumulée selon vétusté"), ncol = 2))

print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(120,10,70,10,"Age de la LIT","Indisponibilité annuelle","Espérance d'indisponibilité annuelle selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}

```

### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}
choix <- data_frame(type=c("","HTB"),lib=c("Tous","Niv. Tension"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")

   a <- COURBE_NA_T_TEMPS(RECUR_T,LS,IFO_LS,"","",choix$type[i]) %>%  mutate(segment = floor(time /15)) %>%  group_by(segment,type) %>%  nest() %>%
  mutate(   slope = map_dbl(data, ~ coef(lm(mcf ~ time, data = .x))["time"]), data = map2(data, slope, ~ mutate(.x, segment_slope  = .y))) %>%  unnest(cols = c(data)) %>%  ungroup()
   b <- COURBE_NA_T_TEMPS(RECUR_VET,LS,IFO_LS,"","",choix$type[i])

print(cowplot::plot_grid(a%>% GRAPH_RECUR(100,10,2400,200,"Age de la LIT","Temps cumulé d'IFO","Durée d'indisponibilité cumulée selon âge"),
                         b%>% GRAPH_RECUR(2.8,0.2,2400,200,"Vétusté de la LIT","Temps cumulé d'IFO","Durée d'indisponibilité cumulée selon vétusté"), ncol = 2))

print(a%>% GRAPH_PENTE(100,10,140,10,"Age de la LIT","Indisponibilité annuelle","Espérance d'indisponibilité annuelle selon âge")+   geom_line(aes(x=time,y=slope,fill=type,color=type),size=1))
cat("  \n")
}

```



# Modélisation de la régression du taux de défaillance

On regarde pour chaque variable s'il y a une corrélation avec le taux de défaillance annuel historique constaté sur les ouvrages.<br>
On utilise ainsi plusieurs modèles de régresssion :<br>
- modèle de régression simple linéaire : lm<br>
- modèle de Poisson : glm (adapté pour le comptage)<br>
- modèle binomial négatif : glmnb (dérivé du modèle de Poisson pour prendre en compte la surdispersion)<br>
- modèle zéro inflation binomial négatif : zipnb (pour prendre en compte que le taux est nul sur de nombreux ouvrages)<br>

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX_LA <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>80,"80+","80-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(NATURE_COND=relevel(as.factor(NATURE_COND), ref = "ALMELEC")) %>%
  mutate(NATURESUBJECTILE=relevel(as.factor(NATURESUBJECTILE), ref = "AG - Acier galva")) %>%
  mutate(GAELA_2025=relevel(as.factor(GAELA_2025), ref = "Non éligible")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))


LIT_TX_LAC <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%   group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>80,"80+","80-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(NATURE_COND=relevel(as.factor(NATURE_COND), ref = "ALMELEC")) %>%
  mutate(NATURESUBJECTILE=relevel(as.factor(NATURESUBJECTILE), ref = "AG - Acier galva")) %>%
  mutate(GAELA_2025=relevel(as.factor(GAELA_2025), ref = "Non éligible")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))


LIT_TX_LAL <- LA %>% left_join(IFO_LA %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%   group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>80,"80+","80-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(NATURE_COND=relevel(as.factor(NATURE_COND), ref = "ALMELEC")) %>%
  mutate(NATURESUBJECTILE=relevel(as.factor(NATURESUBJECTILE), ref = "AG - Acier galva")) %>%
  mutate(GAELA_2025=relevel(as.factor(GAELA_2025), ref = "Non éligible")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))



LIT_TX_LS <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>50,"50+","50-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))

LIT_TX_LSC <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="COURT") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>50,"50+","50-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))

LIT_TX_LSL <- LS %>% left_join(IFO_LS %>% filter(TYPE_IFO=="LONG") %>%  group_by(id) %>% summarize(nt=sum(ERX_DT_TOTH,na.rm=T),nb=n()) %>% ungroup(),by="id") %>%
  mutate(AN_SURV=(DT_FIN-DT_DEB+1)) %>%
  mutate(nb=coalesce(nb,0)) %>%
  mutate(nt=coalesce(nt,0)) %>%
  mutate(TX=nb/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(TXT=nt/AN_SURV) %>%
  mutate(LONGUEUR=LONGUEUR/1000) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG=(round(LONGUEUR/10,0)*10)) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG=as.factor(CAT_LONG)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_LONG_=ifelse(CAT_LONG>30,"30+","30-")) %>% mutate(CAT_LONG_=as.factor(CAT_LONG_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE=(round(AGE/10,0)*10))  %>% mutate(CAT_AGE=as.factor(CAT_AGE)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_AGE_=ifelse(CAT_AGE>50,"50+","50-")) %>% mutate(CAT_AGE_=as.factor(CAT_AGE_)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_VET=(round(VET*10,0)/10))  %>% mutate(CAT_VET=ifelse(CAT_VET>1,"1+","1-")) %>% mutate(CAT_VET=as.factor(CAT_VET)) %>%
  mutate(CAT_Q=ifelse(Q999<0.8,"<0.8",">0.8")) %>% mutate(CAT_Q=as.factor(CAT_Q)) %>%
  mutate(NT_LIT=relevel(as.factor(NT_LIT), ref = "63kV")) %>%
  mutate(HTB=relevel(as.factor(HTB), ref = "HTB1"))

```

## Longueur {.tabset }

### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LA

choix <- data_frame(type=c("","63kV","90kV","150kV","225kV","400kV"),lib=c("Tous","63kV","90kV","150kV","225kV","400kV"),xmax=c(250,60,60,90,140,250))


for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$DATA,choix$xmax[i],"Taux défaillance annuel selon la longueur",0.06,"Longueur des LIT (km)"))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$mod)$coefficients %>% as.data.frame() %>%   mutate(term = rownames(.),term = if_else(row_number() == 2, "LONGUEUR", term)) %>%  select(term, everything()) %>% as_tibble() %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}

```


### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LS

choix <- data_frame(type=c("","63kV","90kV","225kV"),lib=c("Tous","63kV","90kV","225kV"),xmax=c(100,60,60,100))


for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$DATA,choix$xmax[i],"Taux défaillance annuel selon la longueur",0.05,"Longueur des LIT (km)"))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"LONGUEUR")$mod)$coefficients %>% as.data.frame() %>%   mutate(term = rownames(.),term = if_else(row_number() == 2, "LONGUEUR", term)) %>%  select(term, everything()) %>% as_tibble() %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}


```




## Age {.tabset }

### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LA

choix <- data_frame(type=c("","63kV","90kV","150kV","225kV","400kV"),lib=c("Tous","63kV","90kV","150kV","225kV","400kV"),xmax=c(120,120,120,120,120,120))


for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$DATA,choix$xmax[i],"Taux défaillance annuel selon l'âge",0.06,"Age des LIT"))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$mod)$coefficients %>% as.data.frame() %>%   mutate(term = rownames(.),term = if_else(row_number() == 2, "AGE", term)) %>%  select(term, everything()) %>% as_tibble() %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}


```


### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset}

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LS


choix <- data_frame(type=c("","63kV","90kV","225kV"),lib=c("Tous","63kV","90kV","225kV"),xmax=c(100,100,70,70))


for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$DATA,choix$xmax[i],"Taux défaillance annuel selon l'âge",0.06,"Age des LIT"))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,choix$type[i],"AGE")$mod)$coefficients %>% as.data.frame() %>%   mutate(term = rownames(.),term = if_else(row_number() == 2, "AGE", term)) %>%  select(term, everything()) %>% as_tibble() %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}



```


## Données catégorielles {.tabset }

### Liaisons aériennes {.tabset }

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LA

choix <- data_frame(type=c("NT_LIT","NATURE_COND","NATURESUBJECTILE","CORROSION","GAELA_2025","CAT_Q"),
                    lib=c("Tension","Conducteur","Support","Corrosion","GAELA 2025","Niveau de flux >80%"),leg=c("Tension","Conducteur","Support","Corrosion","GAELA 2025","Niveau de flux >80%"))


for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM_F(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$DATA,"Taux défaillance annuel",0.06,choix$leg[i]))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$mod)$coefficients  %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}


```


### Liaisons souterraines {.tabset }

```{r echo=FALSE,fig.height=5,fig.width=12,out.width='100%',message=FALSE,results="asis"}

LIT_TX <- LIT_TX_LS

choix <- data_frame(type=c("NT_LIT","TECHNOLOGIE","CAT_Q"),
                    lib=c("Tension","Technologie","Niveau de flux >80%"),leg=c("Tension","Technologie","Niveau de flux >80%"))

for(i in 1:nrow(choix)) {
  cat("  \n####",  choix$lib[i], " \n")
  print(GRAPH_LM_F(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$DATA,"Taux défaillance annuel",0.06,choix$leg[i]))
  print(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$perf %>% kable(caption="Performance des modèles"))
  print(summary(MODELE_LIT_TX(LIT_TX,"",choix$type[i])$mod)$coefficients  %>%   kable(caption="Coefficients modèle binomal négatif"))
cat("  \n")
}

```
